metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: GaugeCL.notifyRewardAmount: Return Variable Shadows Storage rewardRate, Causing Loss of Remaining Rewards
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: GaugeCL.notifyRewardAmount return variable 'uint256 rewardRate' shadows storage variable, causing leftover rewards to always be zero and storage rewardRate to never update

ECON2-H001.title: Bribe.withdraw Silent Failure Enables Infinite Reward Capture
ECON2-H001.duplicate_group_description: Bribe.withdraw() silently skips withdrawal when amount > balanceOf[tokenId], causing permanent totalSupply/balanceOf desynchronization and phantom reward extraction

ECON-H003.title: BribeFactoryV3.recoverERC20AndUpdateData Calls Wrong Function, Causing Bribe Insolvency
ECON-H003.duplicate_group_description: BribeFactoryV3.recoverERC20AndUpdateData calls emergencyRecoverERC20 instead of recoverERC20AndUpdateData, leaving tokenRewardsPerEpoch stale and causing bribe insolvency

OPS-H001.title: BlackGovernor.clock() Returns Zero Breaking All Governance Functionality
OPS-H001.duplicate_group_description: BlackGovernor.clock() and CLOCK_MODE() have empty implementations returning default values (0 and empty string), breaking all OZ Governor snapshot and voting mechanics

TECH-H005.title: BribeFactoryV3.addRewardsToBribes Inner Loop Uses Outer Array Length, Causing Revert or Missed Tokens
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: BribeFactoryV3.addRewardsToBribes inner loop uses outer array length (_token.length) instead of inner array length (_token[i].length), causing out-of-bounds reverts

TECH-H006.title: GaugeManager._setExternalBribe Emits Wrong Old Value in Event (internal_bribes Instead of external_bribes)
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager._setExternalBribe emits internal_bribes[_gauge] instead of external_bribes[_gauge] as the old value in SetBribeFor event

ECON-H004.title: GaugeManager.claimRewards for CL Gauges Lacks Gauge Validation and Reentrancy Protection
ECON-H004.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager.claimRewards(address,uint256[],bool) for CL gauges lacks isGauge/isCLGauge validation and nonReentrant modifier, allowing arbitrary contract calls via fake gauge address

TECH-H008.title: MinterUpgradeable.calculate_rebase Underflows When smNFT Balance Is Double-Counted
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: MinterUpgradeable.calculate_rebase double-counts smNFT balance (already included in _veTotal), causing arithmetic underflow in circulatingBlack that permanently blocks update_period()

ECON-H008.title: Emissions Permanently Lost When GaugeManager.notifyRewardAmount Called With Zero totalWeight
ECON-H008.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager.notifyRewardAmount transfers tokens before checking totalWeight; when totalWeight==0, tokens are permanently locked with no recovery mechanism

TECH-H010.title: BlackGovernor.quorum Uses Current smNFT Supply Instead of Historical Snapshot, Enabling Manipulation
TECH-H010.duplicate_group_description: BlackGovernor.quorum() calls getsmNFTPastTotalSupply() without timestamp parameter, using current supply instead of historical snapshot, enabling quorum manipulation

TECH-H013.title: Permissionless CL gauge creation can drain/brick GaugeFactoryCL rewardToken balance via repeated createEternalFarming seeding
TECH-H013.duplicate_group_description: GaugeFactoryCL.createGauge is permissionless and calls createEternalFarming which seeds 1e10 reward tokens, allowing attackers to drain factory balance or DoS gauge creation

TECH-H014.title: GaugeManager.createGaugeWithBonusReward contains variable shadowing / redeclaration that may mis-handle bonusRewardToken and break CL gauge creation
TECH-H014.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager._createGauge has variable shadowing/redeclaration of bonusRewardToken parameter, potentially breaking CL gauge bonus reward configuration

TECH-H015.title: Permissionless GaugeManager.claimRewards(address[]) can be abused to call arbitrary gauge contracts and grief or reenter external systems
TECH-H015.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager.claimRewards(address[]) for standard gauges lacks isGauge validation, allowing external calls to arbitrary attacker-controlled contracts

TECH-H016.title: GaugeManager.distribute(_start,_finish) and distributeFees(_start,_finish) lack bounds checks enabling persistent automation failure (range revert)
TECH-H016.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager.distribute(start,finish) and distributeFees(start,finish) lack bounds validation on _finish parameter, causing out-of-bounds reverts

ECON-H005.title: Bribe.earned Unbounded Loop DoS Permanently Locks User Rewards
ECON-H005.duplicate_group_description: Bribe.earned() unbounded epoch loop with WEEK=1800 causes gas limit DoS, permanently locking user bribe rewards after extended non-claim periods

ECON-H010.title: GaugeFactoryCL.createEternalFarming Requires Pre-funded Factory But No Funding Mechanism Exists
ECON-H010.duplicate_group_description: GaugeFactoryCL.createEternalFarming approves and attempts to seed 1e10 reward tokens but factory has no receive mechanism, blocking all CL gauge creation

ECON-H015.title: Unbounded gauge creation allows Block Gas Limit DoS on emissions
ECON-H015.duplicate_group_description: Permissionless GaugeManager.createGauge bloats unbounded pools[] array, causing distributeAll()/distributeFees() to exceed block gas limit and halt epoch automation

ECON2-H006.title: Missing GenesisManager Initialization Bricks Epoch Upkeep
ECON2-H006.duplicate_group_description: EpochController.initialize omits genesisManager; performUpkeep calls genesisManager.checkAtEpochFlip() on address(0), reverting and blocking epoch transitions

ECON2-H020.title: MinterUpgradeable._initialize Race Condition Can Block Protocol Permanently or Corrupt Initial Distribution
ECON2-H020.duplicate_group_description: MinterUpgradeable._initialize is a separate one-shot function gated only by _initializer; if not called or front-run, update_period is permanently blocked

ECON2-H021.title: Forced CL Gauge Reward Claiming Enables Griefing of NFT Position Holders
ECON2-H021.duplicate_group_description: GaugeManager.claimRewards for CL gauges has no NFT ownership verification, enabling forced reward claiming as a griefing vector

TECH-H002.title: Bribe.withdraw Silent Failure Causes Permanent Supply Desynchronization and Reward Dilution

TECH-H009.title: GaugeManager.notifyRewardAmount Permanently Locks Tokens When totalWeight Is Zero

TECH-H011.title: GaugeFactoryCL.setReferralFee Has No Upper Bound, Enabling Fee Distribution DoS or Complete Fee Theft

TECH-H012.title: GaugeCL.setInternalBribe Validation Always Passes, Allowing address(0) That Breaks Fee Distribution

TECH-H017.title: GaugeFactoryCL.setReferralFee can be set above denominator causing GaugeCL.claimFees underflow revert and permanent fee-distribution DoS

TECH-H018.title: GaugeManager.createGauge can revert/bricked if bribefactory not configured (permissionless call as DoS/noise vector)

OPS-H012.title: Permissionless GaugeFactoryCL.createGauge enables external parties to create CL gauges and consume/lock factory reward tokens (economic DoS) while bloating gauge registry

OPS-H013.title: Bribe.notifyRewardAmount allows any connector token; a malicious connector token can grief/DoS claims by reverting on transfer (to veNFT owner) during getReward

OPS-H014.title: GaugeManager.createGauge is permissionless: attacker can spam valid pools to bloat pools[] and induce systemic distribution/fee-claim operational DoS

OPS-H015.title: GaugeManager.claimRewards(address[]) can be used to call arbitrary contracts' getReward(msg.sender) without gauge validation, enabling reentrancy-based disruption or unexpected external effects

OPS-H016.title: GaugeManager.distributeFees(CL) withdraws 100% CommunityVault token balances each call; any revert or permission mismatch blocks fee distribution for all pools in batch runs

OPS-H017.title: Unbounded/unchecked ranged distribution indices allow any caller to force reverts in operational scripts and monitoring (parameter griefing)

OPS-H018.title: EpochController.initialize omits genesisManager; if not configured, performUpkeep hard-reverts and halts epoch operations
